name: ExoMars Trace Gas Orbiter
fact: ExoMars 2016 mission's surviving half (Schiaparelli was the lander). Characterises atmospheric methane, water vapour, and other trace gases at part-per-trillion sensitivity. The methane question — was it real? was it biological? — is what TGO was built to settle. So far, the data favour the conclusion that earlier reports of methane plumes were measurement artefacts.
capability: Highest-sensitivity atmospheric trace-gas mapping at any planet.
